Client:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local PREFIX = "[ClientBootstrapper]:"
local localPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer

local PriorityModules: { ModuleScript } = {
	
}

local function isPriorityModule(moduleScript: ModuleScript): boolean
	return table.find(PriorityModules, moduleScript) ~= nil
end

local function waitForAttribute(instance: Instance, attributeName: string)
	if instance:GetAttribute(attributeName) == true then
		return
	end

	local changed = instance:GetAttributeChangedSignal(attributeName)
	while instance:GetAttribute(attributeName) ~= true do
		changed:Wait()
	end
end

local function discoverModules(): { ModuleScript }
	local modules: { ModuleScript } = {}

	for _, container in { script.Parent.Core, script.Parent.Features } do
		for _, child in container:GetChildren() do
			local entryPoint = child:FindFirstChild("init")
			if entryPoint and entryPoint:IsA("ModuleScript") and not isPriorityModule(entryPoint) then
				table.insert(modules, entryPoint)
			end
		end
	end

	table.sort(modules, function(a: ModuleScript, b: ModuleScript): boolean
		return a:GetFullName() < b:GetFullName()
	end)

	return modules
end

local function initializeModule(moduleScript: ModuleScript)
	local startedAt = os.clock()
	local success, failure = pcall(function()
		local loadedModule = require(moduleScript)
		if type(loadedModule) ~= "table" then
			error(`Expected {moduleScript:GetFullName()} to return a table`)
		end

		if type(loadedModule.Init) == "function" then
			loadedModule:Init()
		end
		if type(loadedModule.Start) == "function" then
			loadedModule:Start()
		end
	end)
	local elapsed = os.clock() - startedAt
	local formattedElapsed = string.format("%.3f", elapsed)

	if not success then
		warn(`{PREFIX} Failed to initialize {moduleScript:GetFullName()}: {failure}`)
		return
	end

	if elapsed < 3 then
		print(`{PREFIX} {moduleScript.Name} initialized in {formattedElapsed} seconds`)
	else
		warn(`{PREFIX} SLOW INIT - {moduleScript.Name} took {formattedElapsed} seconds to initialize`)
	end
end

waitForAttribute(workspace, "ServerLoaded")
waitForAttribute(localPlayer, "Loaded")

local normalModules = discoverModules()
local initialized: { [ModuleScript]: boolean } = {}

for _, moduleScript in PriorityModules do
	if not initialized[moduleScript] then
		initialized[moduleScript] = true
		initializeModule(moduleScript)
	end
end

for _, moduleScript in normalModules do
	if not initialized[moduleScript] then
		initialized[moduleScript] = true
		initializeModule(moduleScript)
	end
end

print(`{PREFIX} Client initialized`)
Server:
local PREFIX = "[ServerBootstrapper]:"

local PriorityModules: { ModuleScript } = {
	
}

local function isPriorityModule(moduleScript: ModuleScript): boolean
	return table.find(PriorityModules, moduleScript) ~= nil
end

local function discoverModules(): { ModuleScript }
	local modules: { ModuleScript } = {}

	for _, container in { script.Parent.Core, script.Parent.Features } do
		for _, child in container:GetChildren() do
			local entryPoint = child:FindFirstChild("init")
			if entryPoint and entryPoint:IsA("ModuleScript") and not isPriorityModule(entryPoint) then
				table.insert(modules, entryPoint)
			end
		end
	end

	table.sort(modules, function(a: ModuleScript, b: ModuleScript): boolean
		return a:GetFullName() < b:GetFullName()
	end)

	return modules
end

local function initializeModule(moduleScript: ModuleScript)
	local startedAt = os.clock()
	local success, failure = pcall(function()
		local loadedModule = require(moduleScript)
		if type(loadedModule) ~= "table" then
			error(`Expected {moduleScript:GetFullName()} to return a table`)
		end

		if type(loadedModule.Init) == "function" then
			loadedModule:Init()
		end
		if type(loadedModule.Start) == "function" then
			loadedModule:Start()
		end
	end)
	local elapsed = os.clock() - startedAt
	local formattedElapsed = string.format("%.3f", elapsed)

	if not success then
		warn(`{PREFIX} Failed to initialize {moduleScript:GetFullName()}: {failure}`)
		return
	end

	if elapsed < 3 then
		print(`{PREFIX} {moduleScript.Name} initialized in {formattedElapsed} seconds`)
	else
		warn(`{PREFIX} SLOW INIT - {moduleScript.Name} took {formattedElapsed} seconds to initialize`)
	end
end

workspace:SetAttribute("ServerLoaded", false)

local normalModules = discoverModules()
local initialized: { [ModuleScript]: boolean } = {}

for _, moduleScript in PriorityModules do
	if not initialized[moduleScript] then
		initialized[moduleScript] = true
		initializeModule(moduleScript)
	end
end

for _, moduleScript in normalModules do
	if not initialized[moduleScript] then
		initialized[moduleScript] = true
		initializeModule(moduleScript)
	end
end

workspace:SetAttribute("ServerLoaded", true)
print(`{PREFIX} Server initialized`)
